description_long: This kiosk features a futuristic, cylindrical central core surrounded by five elevated platforms, each encased in a transparent blue dome. The platforms are supported by black, open-frame legs, giving the structure a lightweight yet sturdy appearance. Inside each dome, small green plant-like elements are visible, suggesting a botanical or scientific function. The central core has a glowing green circular display or interface on its front, adding to the high-tech aesthetic. The overall design is symmetrical, with the domes evenly spaced around the core, and the materials appear to be a combination of metal, glass or acrylic, and illuminated components. The kiosk's sleek, modern look and glowing elements make it suitable for urban environments such as parks, plazas, or science-themed installations.
description: A futuristic kiosk with a glowing central core, surrounded by five transparent domes on elevated black frames, each containing green plant-like elements. The design is sleek, symmetrical, and high-tech, with illuminated and transparent materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glowing green interface on the central core and all five domed platforms with visible green plant elements.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the domes and the open-frame support structure, with the central core partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetry of the five domes and the central core, with less emphasis on the glowing interface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the domes and their supports, with the central core mostly obscured.
attribute_roof_design: Five individual domed roofs made of transparent blue material, each covering a platform; no overhangs or awnings.
